name: Instant Kimchi (Korean Gut Churi Kimchi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the cabbage into pieces about 1 1/2 inches long and 1 1/2 inches wide. Three cups of chopped cabbage are needed.
2. Crush the garlic and blend with the hot pepper, soy sauce, and vinegar. Add the cabbage and mix well. Add the salt and sugar, mix thoroughly, and cover until ready to serve.
